title: pyrus lingshiensis
intro: Pyrus lingshiensis, also known as the Tibetan mountain pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pyrus lingshiensis include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and supporting respiratory and digestive health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
